prestazioni: AMG M120 7.3L V12 (M297) engine recalibration via Pagani-specific Motec M150 ECU with bespoke fuel maps optimized for 102-octane race fuel, increasing output to 820 HP at 7,500 RPM and 650 lb-ft of torque at 5,500 RPM while maintaining 8,200 RPM redline via reinforced titanium valvetrain components from CP-Carrillo and upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (12.5:1 compression ratio).

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo (3.5-inch diameter, 4-2-1-2-1 merge collector design) with Inconel 625 headers and dual Akrapovic carbon fiber mufflers, reducing backpressure by 38% and saving 18 kg over OEM while retaining the signature Zonda exhaust note via tuned Helmholtz resonators.

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) paired with Pagani-specific spherical bearing top mounts and 12-position adjustable roll bars (front: 24mm, rear: 22mm) from Hyperco, lowering ride height by 22mm while maintaining 100% bump travel via custom-machined aluminum spring perches.
estetica: Full carbon fiber aero package by Pagani Composite Research, including a revised front splitter with integrated vortex generators (32% more downforce at 250 km/h), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch), and a central fin extending from the windshield to the rear spoiler for improved high-speed stability (tested in Dallara wind tunnel).

Bespoke Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with carbon-ceramic discs (410mm front, 390mm rear) featuring Pagani’s proprietary ‘spiral groove’ cooling pattern, reducing brake fade by 42% during track use while saving 12 kg per corner; calipers finished in ‘HP Barchetta Rosso’ with laser-etched Pagani logos.

Custom carbon fiber wheels by Dymag (19x10 front, 20x13 rear) with titanium lug bolts and center-locking system, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/35 ZR19 front, 335/30 ZR20 rear) featuring Pagani-specific compound (Pirelli ‘HP Barchetta’ code) for 1.2g lateral grip; wheels feature a unique ‘spoke-within-spoke’ design to reduce unsprung mass by 28% over OEM.
